## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:

-->
Closes #280

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
- adds a warning when asked to `build_models!` with a machine learning tool that is already built.
- skips the build stage entirely
- adds unit tests

In the Content, I have included

title: Orad/fix emulator bug repeat call
